lineup_source: Projected starting XI, 3-4-2-1, group stage 2026 (Uzbekistan's first-ever World Cup)

players.name: Utkir Yusupov
players.note: Born in Sayram, Kazakhstan, to an ethnic Uzbek family; moved to Uzbekistan at age 5 and naturalized in 2017.

players.name: Rustam Ashurmatov
players.note: Born in Kokand; no documented foreign parentage, assumed Uzbek family.

players.name: Abdukodir Khusanov
players.note: Born in Tashkent; father Khikmat Khoshimov a former Uzbekistan international footballer.

players.name: Sherzod Nasrullaev
players.note: Born in Koson; full patronymic name (Innatillo o'g'li) confirms Uzbek father, no foreign heritage documented.

players.name: Odiljon Khamrobekov
players.note: Born in Uzbekistan; no documented foreign parentage, assumed Uzbek family.

players.name: Otabek Shukurov
players.note: Team captain, born in Uzbekistan; no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Akmal Mozgovoy
players.note: Born in Qarshi; categorized as 'Uzbekistani of Russian descent' with Slavic surname and patronymic Vladimirovich, indicating a Russian father.

players.name: Oston Urunov
players.note: Born in Navoiy; patronymic (Rustam o'g'li) confirms Uzbek father; spent years playing in Russia but no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Jaloliddin Masharipov
players.note: Born in Urgench; patronymic (Qadomboy o'g'li) confirms Uzbek father.

players.name: Abbosbek Fayzullaev
players.note: Born in Sirdaryo Region; patronymic (Sayidjon o'g'li) confirms Uzbek father; scored Uzbekistan's first-ever World Cup goal.

players.name: Eldor Shomurodov
players.note: Captain and all-time top scorer; born in Jarqo'rg'on into a football family — father, uncles, and brother all played professionally for Uzbek clubs/national team.
